news.headline: Considering investment options for $1M in current market conditions.

news.summary: Victoria's Secret & Co. (NYSE: VSCO) announced that their earnings for the first quarter were in line with expectations. The company recorded adjusted earnings per share of 9 cents, matching the analyst consensus. Quarterly sales remained steady at $1.35 billion compared to the previous year, meeting expectations. CEO Hillary Super expressed satisfaction with the business's performance in March and April, highlighting the success in Beauty products, PINK apparel, and advancements in sport and swimwear. The brand is aiming to reestablish itself as a comprehensive lifestyle brand. Victoria's Secret has revised its full-year 2025 adjusted operating income forecast to a range of $270 million to $320 million.
news.headline: Victoria's Secret reports Q1 earnings in line with analyst estimates: EPS of 9 cents and sales of $1.35 billion. Lowered FY25 adjusted operating income guidance to $270-$320 million. CEO notes strength in Beauty and PINK apparel.

news.summary: Thursday saw a significant drop of 300 points in the Dow Jones Industrial Average due to news of new tariffs imposed by Trump. This news particularly impacted Boeing, as their stock took a plunge following a crash involving a 787 jet. The stock market was closely monitored throughout the day, with live coverage reporting on the developments.
news.headline: Dow Jones drops 300 points on Trump tariff news; Boeing shares fall after 787 jet crash.

news.summary: Casella Waste Systems, Inc. (Nasdaq: CWST) will mark its 50th Anniversary by participating in the Opening Bell ceremony at Nasdaq on June 17th.
news.headline: Casella Waste Systems celebrates 50 years by ringing Nasdaq Opening Bell on June 17 for Global Garbageman Day.

news.summary: An increase in the adoption of Artificial Intelligence (AI) is putting pressure on enterprises to innovate quickly while managing new cyber and regulatory risks. Industries like banking and healthcare, which have strict regulations, face challenges due to their fragmented infrastructure, changing compliance requirements, and vulnerable data pipelines. These issues can impede digital initiatives, emphasizing the need for solutions like ConceptV.
news.headline: ConceptVines and Neovera partner to accelerate secure AI adoption for organizations in regulated industries, like banking and healthcare.

news.summary: The fourth Tashkent International Investment Forum (TIIF) commenced in Uzbekistan’s capital, Tashkent, underscoring its significance in the regional investment landscape. During the opening ceremony, President Shavkat Mirziyoyev emphasized Uzbekistan's position as a burgeoning center for investment sustainability. He urged increased international collaboration and highlighted the nation’s forward-looking reform plans, including initiatives in green energy, digitalization, financial modernization, and strategic growth.
news.headline: IV Tashkent International Investment Forum in Uzbekistan highlights economic growth, with President Mirziyoyev stressing on sustainable investment and reform agenda, focusing on green energy and digital transformation.

news.summary: A medium-sized unmanned aircraft system, AV’s JUMP 20, is assisting the U.S. Navy’s 4th Fleet in Operation Southern Spear. The drone is playing a crucial role in the operation, showcasing its capabilities in supporting naval missions. The JUMP 20, designed by AV, is effectively aiding the fleet in achieving its objectives in the operation. This development highlights the growing significance of unmanned aerial technologies in military operations, particularly in supporting naval activities.
news.headline: AV's JUMP 20 Medium UAS supports US Navy's 4th Fleet in Operation Southern Spear in Arlington, VA.

Iranian President in response to the IAEA governors' decision: We will continue enrichment, continue on our path, and will not deviate from the current approach.
- Sky News Arabia on X

news.summary: In Seattle, a recent study from doxo shows that American households collectively spend a staggering $164 billion every year on cable and internet services. This amount makes up about 4% of the total $4.55 trillion spent on various household bills annually across the country. By analyzing real payment data from 97% of U.S. zip codes, doxoINSIGHTS' Cable & Internet Market Size and Household Spend Report for 2025 has determined that approximately 73% of households in the U.S. are part of this market.
news.headline: U.S. households spend $164 billion yearly on cable & internet services, 4% of total $4.55 trillion spent on household bills.

news.summary: In Deerfield, Illinois, and San Francisco, Walgreens partners with Greater Than HIV/STDs campaign by KFF to offer free rapid HIV, syphilis, and hepatitis C testing at over 575 Walgreens stores on June 27 for National HIV Testing Day (NHTD), the largest event of its kind in the nation. Over 415 local testing partners across almost every state, as well as Washington, D.C. and Puerto Rico, are participating in this year's initiative, setting a new record for involvement.
news.headline: Walgreens and KFF to offer free HIV/STD testing at 575 stores on June 27 for National HIV Testing Day, with 415+ local testing partners.

news.summary: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM) reported a quarterly cash dividend of $0.66 per common stock share. The dividend will be paid on August 22, 2025, to shareholders of record as of July 18, 2025. Williams-Sonoma, Inc. is a leading sustainable home retailer known for its digital-first approach and design-focused products.
news.headline: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM) declares $0.66 quarterly dividend per share; payable on August 22, 2025 to shareholders by July 18.

news.summary: In El Segundo, California, Mattel, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAT), a major player in the toy and family entertainment industry, has partnered with OpenAI to create AI-powered products and experiences centered around Mattel's renowned brand portfolio. This collaboration aims to leverage the strengths of both companies in order to introduce innovative and immersive offerings for fans globally. Through this strategic agreement, utilizing OpenAI's cutting-edge technology, Mattel is poised to bring groundbreaking experiences to audiences.
news.headline: Mattel partners with OpenAI to create AI-powered products based on Mattel's iconic brands, bringing innovative experiences to fans globally.

news.summary: In New York today, the top AI-powered advertising platform Smartly unveiled major upgrades to Brand Pulse, the sole real-time, cross-channel brand evaluation and enhancement tool in the industry. This innovation is tailored to address a key obstacle in digital advertising by providing insights on the effectiveness, location, and reasons behind a campaign's success while it is ongoing. Assessing and fine-tuning upper-funnel brand promotions has typically been disjointed and time-consuming. Frequently, brands face challenges in accurately analyzing the impact of their efforts across various channels.
news.headline: Smartly improves Brand Pulse with real-time cross-channel brand measurement and optimization, aiding in understanding campaign performance.

news.summary: A company based in San Francisco called Landbase, which specializes in AI technology for business growth, has recently secured $30 million in Series A funding. This funding round was co-led by Sound Ventures, an AI-focused fund founded by Ashton Kutcher and Guy Oseary, as well as returning investor Picus Capital. Noteworthy participation in the funding round also came from existing backers such as 8VC, A*, Firstminute Capital, and TheGP. This successful funding round highlights a strong belief in Landbase's growth and mission.
news.headline: Landbase secures $30M in Series A funding from Sound Ventures and Picus Capital for growth in business analytics.

news.summary: In Irvine, California, Comfort Keepers®, a top provider of home care for seniors and adults requiring assistance, is marking its seventh annual National Day of Joy on June 25, 2025. With a focus on recognizing caregivers, the company intends to emphasize the emotional significance of caregiving by revealing insights from a recent national survey. Additionally, it will showcase the PBS documentary, Caregiving, in collaboration with WETA. This initiative aims to deepen appreciation for caregivers and their vital role in assisting individuals.
news.headline: National survey shows caregiving is fulfilling; Comfort Keepers celebrates National Day of Joy on June 25, 2025.
MATTEL & OPENAI REPORT PACT  TO USE OPENAI’S CHATGPT ENTERPRISE FOR PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT  TO ANNOUNCE FIRST PRODUCT LATER THIS YEAR $MAT $MSFT

news.summary: In Mountain View, California, LG Ad Solutions, a prominent player in advanced advertising for Connected TV and cross-screen devices, has revealed a new partnership with Akkio, an AI-driven platform tailored for media firms. This collaboration aims to revolutionize the way customers engage with LG Ad Solutions' cutting-edge ACR (automatic content recognition) data. By leveraging ACR data sourced directly from LG's Smart TV screens, the partnership will deliver quicker and more comprehensive insights into genuine consumer behavior on a large scale. This strategic move underscores LG Ad Solutions' commitment to enhancing its offerings and optimizing customer interactions through innovative technology.
news.headline: LG Ad Solutions and Akkio partner to enhance insights from ACR data for improved consumer behavior analysis at scale.

news.summary: 8x8, Inc., headquartered in Campbell, California, has been acknowledged for its commitment to providing tailored, effective, and smart solutions for enhancing customer experience. The company, listed on the NASDAQ exchange under the ticker symbol EGHT, continues to receive recognition for its efforts in this area.
news.headline: 8x8, Inc. (NASDAQ: EGHT) honored for outstanding customer experience with personalized, efficient innovations in Campbell, California.

news.summary: In Ottawa, Ontario, Multiview Financial Software, a prominent enterprise resource planning solutions (ERP) provider for healthcare, revealed its recognition as a preferred technology partner of OCHIN. This collaboration positions Multiview as the favored ERP provider for OCHIN, with the goal of enhancing the financial resilience of community health centers and hospitals within OCHIN's network. The primary objective is to guarantee equitable healthcare accessibility. OCHIN is dedicated to delivering informational solutions and their mission emphasizes providing this support.
news.headline: Multiview partners with OCHIN as preferred ERP provider to enhance finance stability in healthcare centers, ensuring quality care access.

news.summary: Tideworks Technology, based in Seattle, has recently announced their expansion of leadership aiming to enhance global growth and customer innovation. The company is making strategic moves to further their reach and develop new solutions for their customers worldwide. This initiative includes boosting key positions within the organization to drive their growth strategy forward. Tideworks is focused on leveraging this expansion to continue providing cutting-edge technology and services to meet the evolving needs of their clientele on a global scale.
news.headline: Tideworks Technology expands leadership to drive global growth and customer innovation in Seattle.

news.summary: VIVERSE, a prominent 3D content distribution platform, has announced its support for all major WebXR game engines for VIVERSE Worlds. With the immersive storytelling and content creation industry expected to reach a projected $58 billion by 2030, the demand for an open, engine-agnostic platform has become increasingly vital. VIVERSE stands out as the sole platform that accommodates the leading game engines without the need for proprietary tools, positioning itself as the prime hub for hosting and exploring interactive content.
news.headline: HTC VIVERSE: 1st immersive platform to support all major WebXR game engines. Projected $58 billion for 3D content creation by 2030.

news.summary: Estée Lauder, the leading brand of The Estée Lauder Companies, has announced the official debut of its products on Amazon.ca Premium Beauty store, expanding its reach to a larger audience in Canada. This launch offers customers easier access to Estée Lauder's top-quality skincare, premium makeup, and renowned fragrances through the convenience of Amazon. The brand initially entered the Amazon.com Premium Beauty store in Fall 2024. The move to Amazon.ca signifies a crucial step for Estée Lauder in connecting with more consumers in Canada.
news.headline: Estée Lauder expands to Amazon.ca Premium Beauty store, offering skin care, makeup, and fragrances to Canadian customers.

news.summary: In San Jose, California, Adobe (NASDAQ: ADBE) revealed a collaboration with Newell Brands (NASDAQ: NWL), a prominent global consumer goods corporation, to utilize generative AI through Adobe Firefly and Adobe Express. This partnership aims to enhance their consumer engagement globally. Newell Brands boasts a diverse portfolio of more than 50 renowned brands such as Sharpie®, Rubbermaid®, Coleman®, and Yankee Candle®, targeting various audiences and categories where brand recognition is crucial.
news.headline: Newell Brands partners with Adobe to implement generative AI through Adobe Firefly and Adobe Express for global consumer reach, including 50+ iconic brands.

news.summary: Genesis Therapeutics has recently named Aleksandra Faust as its Chief Artificial Intelligence Officer. Aleksandra Faust will be responsible for overseeing the utilization of artificial intelligence technology within the company. This appointment signifies an important step for Genesis Therapeutics as they focus on incorporating AI into their operations.
news.headline: Genesis Therapeutics names Aleksandra Faust as Chief Artificial Intelligence Officer in Burlingame, California.

news.summary: In Oakland, California, Bambu Dessert Drinks, a popular Vietnamese dessert and beverage brand, has revealed a new tech collaboration with Square. This partnership involves implementing Square's hardware and software solutions in all Bambu North America outlets. The aim is to streamline operations and centralize menu management across their fast-growing franchise network. Bambu initiated its franchise model in 2015 and has since spread its reach to numerous locations in the United States and Canada.
news.headline: Square partners with Bambu Dessert Drinks for growth, bringing tech to 30+ locations across US and Canada - 2015 franchising.

news.summary: A recent survey conducted by the CFA Institute in 2025 in New York indicates that finance has become the preferred career option among university students and recent graduates. The survey highlights that 37 percent of respondents view finance as the most promising career path, showing a significant increase from 30 percent in 2024 and 24 percent in 2023. This represents a notable 54 percent rise over the past two years. Additionally, the survey points out that artificial intelligence is seen as both a risk and an opportunity in the finance sector by respondents.
news.headline: 2025 CFA Institute survey finds finance as top choice for 37% of students, up from 24% in 2023, with AI seen as risk and opportunity.

news.summary: Business technology company Seismic recently announced their Spring 2025 Product Release in London. The release introduces the new Role-Play Agent as part of the company's strategy to integrate AI across all facets of enablement. This move signifies Seismic's commitment to innovation and technology advancement, positioning them as a leader in the industry.
news.headline: Seismic introduces AI-powered Role-Play Agent in Spring 2025 Product Release, improving coaching for revenue teams.

news.summary: In San Diego, Seismic has announced their latest Spring 2025 Product Release, highlighting their commitment to integrating AI across all aspects of enablement. The update introduces the innovative Role Play Agent, showcasing the company's dedication to incorporating advanced technology.
news.headline: Seismic to release Spring 2025 product with AI at every stage; introduces Role Play Agent.

news.summary: In a recent announcement, Odyssey Transfer and Trust Company, a prominent North American transfer agent and trust company, has revealed a new partnership with Carta, a specialized software platform for private capital. Through this exclusive collaboration, Carta's cap table infrastructure will be integrated with Odyssey's extensive experience in IPOs and public markets within North America. This synergistic alliance aims to provide a comprehensive transfer agency solution for private companies gearing up for the transition to the public sphere. This venture is set to streamline the process and offer a range of services tailored to the needs of companies in this sector, enhancing their journey towards going public.
news.headline: Odyssey Transfer announces partnership with Carta for private companies seeking IPO, offering end-to-end solution.

news.summary: A recent survey conducted by CFA Institute revealed that in the 2025 Global Graduate Outlook Survey, Canadian university students and recent graduates are increasingly optimistic about the career prospects within the finance industry. According to the survey findings, 40% of Canadian respondents now view finance as the most promising sector for employment opportunities, showcasing a significant uptick from 21% recorded two years prior. The results highlight a growing confidence among the younger population in Canada towards finance as a viable career path.
news.headline: Canadian graduates show increased confidence in finance careers, with a 40% rate, nearly doubled in two years - CFA Institute.

news.summary: In Denver, Render Networks, a prominent figure in intelligent network construction management, has revealed the recruitment of two senior telecom executives. David Hicks is now the Chief Strategy Officer, while Anish Kelkar takes on the role of Chief Revenue Officer. These additions aim to drive Render's dedication to expediting broadband infrastructure deployment and expanding its presence in a swiftly changing market landscape. With these new hires, Render is set to leverage the extensive industry knowledge of David and Anish to address the demand for efficient network solutions.
news.headline: Render Networks appoints David Hicks as Chief Strategy Officer and Anish Kelkar as Chief Revenue Officer to accelerate growth in the broadband infrastructure market.

news.summary: In Santa Ana, California, HomeXpress Mortgage Corp. revealed today that they have finalized a deal for acquisition by Chimera Investment Corporation.
news.headline: HomeXpress Mortgage Corp. in Santa Ana, Calif., announces acquisition by Chimera Investment Corp.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Planet Labs PBC (NYSE: PL) has secured a major contract with NATO worth in the seven figures. The company, known for offering daily data on Earth transformations, will provide advanced monitoring and intelligence services to NATO in its key operational zones. This significant partnership reflects the current period of notable global transitions, with a focus on nations in Europe bolstering defense capacities to address evolving challenges.
news.headline: Planet Labs awarded NATO a seven-figure contract for advanced daily monitoring and intelligence services, reflecting a crucial global demand for enhanced defense capabilities.

news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate dropped to 4.8% in the month of October, marking a decrease from the previous rate of 5.2%. This positive development comes as the economy added 250,000 new jobs during the same period. The labor force participation rate also saw an increase, reaching 62.5%. Additionally, the average hourly earnings recorded a growth of 2.5% compared to the previous year. These statistics indicate a strengthening job market and a positive outlook for the economy in the coming months.
news.headline: Glucotrack's reverse stock split approved by shareholders to meet NASDAQ listing requirements.
MATTEL INC - CO AND OPENAI WILL CONTINUE COLLABORATING TO SIMULTANEOUSLY DEVELOP A SERIES OF PRODUCTS AND EXPERIENCES $MAT $MSFT

news.summary: In Los Angeles on June 12, 2025, PAIRMiner announced the launch of its international cloud mining platform catering to the increasing investor interest in digital assets. The platform offers short-term mining contracts for popular cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin (BTC), Dogecoin (DOGE), Litecoin (LTC), and Ethereum Classic (ETC). This initiative aims to make cryptocurrency mining more accessible by eliminating the need to invest in and maintain physical hardware. Users can easily start mining through a browser or mobile device. New users signing up are granted $150 in complimentary credit to begin their mining journey. Find the complete story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: PAIRMiner launches cloud mining platform for Bitcoin and other cryptos, with daily payouts. Offers short-term contracts for BTC, DOGE, LTC, ETC. Users start with $150 complimentary credit.

news.summary: A pioneering company has launched innovative advertising tools that customize brand messages according to real-world actions. These tools provide concrete measurement of in-store results through deterministic analysis. The groundbreaking tools offer a unique way to reach consumers with high accuracy and relevance.
news.headline: Life360 launches Place Ads and Uplift, revolutionizing real-world targeting and measurement for brand ads.
Seeking advice on investing $1 million? Visit Bloomberg.com for insights.

news.summary: The Shark Party celebration at the New York Aquarium in Brooklyn features a variety of exciting activities and animal experiences focusing on our beloved underwater predators.
news.headline: New York Aquarium introduces Shark Party with exciting activities and experiences; a celebration showcasing underwater predators.

news.summary: In Mountain View, California, BetterHelp, the largest online therapy platform globally, revealed long-term collaborations with the WNBA's reigning champions, the New York Liberty, along with the Las Vegas Aces and Dallas Wings. The partnerships, unveiled during Mental Health Awareness Month in May, connect BetterHelp with all three teams to promote mental health programs and spark essential dialogues regarding mental well-being, particularly within the realm of sports. The aim is to underscore the significance of mental wellness, specifically among athletes.
news.headline: BetterHelp partners with WNBA teams New York Liberty, Las Vegas Aces, Dallas Wings, for mental health support.

news.summary: Renowned musician Roger Waters, known for his role as a founding member of Pink Floyd, is set to make a cinematic comeback with "This Is Not A Drill – Live From Prague – The Movie." The film captures Waters' mesmerizing performance in Prague as he showcases his creative brilliance. The production is expected to bring in audiences worldwide to witness this iconic event on screen.
news.headline: Roger Waters will bring 'This Is Not A Drill – Live From Prague – The Movie' to cinemas worldwide, marking his return.

news.summary: Three primary care physicians affiliated with Village Medical have recently been honored as Top Doctors in the 2025 rankings by The Atlantan, in collaboration with the renowned healthcare research firm Castle Connolly. These physicians have been recognized for their ongoing dedication to providing exceptional care within the Atlanta area and have each received this prestigious designation on multiple occasions. The selection process for Castle Connolly’s Top Doctors involves nominations from peers and thorough evaluation by a team of physicians specializing in research.
news.headline: Three Village Medical physicians named 2025 Top Doctors by The Atlantan, recognized for exceptional care in Atlanta community.

news.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. revealed today its initiation of two transactions to buy back 10 series of its existing notes. The repurchase is focused on bonds listed in the tables provided, and encompasses a significant financial move for the company. Verizon, listed on both NYSE and Nasdaq as VZ, is undertaking this strategic financial decision for reasons most likely related to debt management and optimizing capital structure.
news.headline: Verizon offers private exchange for 10 series of notes, aims to repurchase outstanding notes on table.

NTSB: NTSB WILL BE LEADING A TEAM OF US INVESTIGATORS TRAVELLING TO INDIA TO ASSIST THE AIRCRAFT ACCIDENT INVESTIGATION BUREAU WITH ITS INVESTIGATION
AWS prepares to revamp AI cloud service Bedrock - Information.

news.summary: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates, FountAir, a company based in Hong Kong, has received international acclaim for its innovative advancements in air-to-water and cooling technology. This breakthrough has garnered significant attention on a global scale.
news.headline: Hong Kong's FountAir gains global acclaim for innovative air-to-water and cooling tech; recognized in Dubai.

news.summary: In Washington today, the DC Guaranteed Income Coalition is organizing a Day of Action to advocate for the protection and enhancement of crucial programs for families. The event will focus on securing funding for key initiatives like the Child Tax Credit in DC, Baby Bonds, the Strong Families, Strong Future DC pilot, and Child Care Subsidies, among other essential programs aimed at promoting financial stability and advancement for families throughout the District. Mayor Muriel Bowser's administration has faced criticisms for potential cuts to these programs.
news.headline: DC Guaranteed Income Coalition holds Day of Action to support critical programs for families; advocating for Child Tax Credit, Baby Bonds, pilot programs, and more.

news.summary: In Houston, Raptor Technologies introduced Raptor EventSafe, a new solution aiming to improve event management and safety in K-12 schools. This innovative platform allows school staff to easily coordinate events like assemblies and visits, while prioritizing campus safety. Raptor EventSafe is the first of its kind and offers a comprehensive approach to streamline event planning. It enables efficient organization and execution of various school events without compromising safety standards. This solution ensures a seamless integration for schools looking to enhance their safety protocols during events.
news.headline: Raptor Technologies introduces Raptor EventSafe for K-12 schools, enhancing safety and efficiency for events.

news.summary: In Rockville, Maryland, the Maryland Tech Council, the state's largest technology and life sciences trade association, has revealed that Dr. Marty Makary, the Food and Drug Administration Commissioner, will engage in a fireside chat at the 2025 Bio Innovation Conference on September 4, 2025. The event will be held at the Bethesda North Marriott Hotel and Conference Center. Dr. Makary assumed office on March 25, 2025, after confirmation by a bipartisan vote of the U.S. Senate.
news.headline: Dr. Marty Makary, FDA Commissioner, joins 2025 Bio Innovation Conference in Maryland on Sep 4, after bipartisan Senate confirmation on Mar 25, 2025.
